name: Apple Cheddar Wontons
recipeIngredient: 2 apples, core removed and cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1 Core the apples and cut into small pieces.
2 Mix 1/2 cup brown sugar with 2 tablespoons cinnamon and set aside.
3 Heat peanut oil in a deep fryer or pan for deep frying until ready to use.
4 Wrap a piece of apple and a cube of cheddar cheese in a wonton skin, sealing as directed on the package.
5 Deep fry until golden brown.
6 Remove from oil and coat with the brown sugar-cinnamon mixture.
7 Serve hot or cold.
